convert-pdf-to-pdf-ua-with-auto-tagging.title: Convert PDF to PDF/UA with Automatic Tagging
convert-pdf-to-pdf-ua-with-auto-tagging.description: Shows how to convert an existing PDF to a PDF/UA‑1 compliant document by enabling automatic tagging and saving it as a tagged PDF.

create-pdf-with-tagged-heading.title: Create PDF with Tagged Heading and Language
create-pdf-with-tagged-heading.description: Shows how to create a new PDF, add a level‑1 heading structure element, set document‑level and element language attributes, and save the tagged PDF for accessibility.

set-root-structure-element-title.title: Set Root Structure Element Title in Tagged PDF
set-root-structure-element-title.description: Demonstrates how to assign a title to the root structure element of a tagged PDF using Aspose.Pdf, and optionally updates the document's Info.Title property before saving.

create-tagged-pdf-with-toc.title: Create Tagged PDF with Table of Contents
create-tagged-pdf-with-toc.description: Demonstrates how to generate a PDF with tagged content, add heading elements, and build a logical table of contents using Aspose.Pdf.

add-paragraph-to-toci-element-actualtext.title: Add Paragraph to TOCI Element with ActualText for Accessibility
add-paragraph-to-toci-element-actualtext.description: Demonstrates how to create a TOCI (Table of Contents Item) element, add a paragraph beneath it, and set the paragraph's ActualText to improve screen‑reader accessibility in a tagged PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-custom-tag-to-paragraph.title: Add Custom Tag to Paragraph in Tagged PDF
add-custom-tag-to-paragraph.description: Demonstrates how to assign a custom tag name to a paragraph element in a tagged PDF using Aspose.Pdf and save the document.

add-external-link-with-title-to-tagged-p.title: Add External Link with Title to a Tagged PDF
add-external-link-with-title-to-tagged-p.description: Demonstrates how to insert a clickable link with visible text and a title attribute into a tagged PDF for accessibility using Aspose.Pdf.

add-internal-link-element-to-tagged-pdf.title: Add Internal Link Element to Tagged PDF
add-internal-link-element-to-tagged-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to create a structure element with the /Link role in a tagged PDF, bind it to a visual link annotation, and set an internal page destination.

add-note-element-to-paragraph.title: Add Note Element to Paragraph in Tagged PDF
add-note-element-to-paragraph.description: Demonstrates how to create a note (footnote/endnote) element and attach it as a child of a paragraph in a tagged PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-caption-note-to-figure-in-tagged-pdf.title: Add Caption Note to Figure in Tagged PDF
add-caption-note-to-figure-in-tagged-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's tagged‑content API to create a Figure element, attach a Note element as its caption, and save the PDF with proper accessibility tags.

add-actualtext-to-images.title: Add ActualText to Images for PDF Accessibility
add-actualtext-to-images.description: Demonstrates how to attach an ActualText attribute to image structure elements in a tagged PDF using Aspose.Pdf, providing screen‑reader descriptions for accessibility.

set-actualtext-span-pronunciation.title: Set ActualText on a Span for Hidden Pronunciation in Tagged PDF
set-actualtext-span-pronunciation.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf's TaggedContent API to create a span element, assign hidden pronunciation text via the ActualText property, and add it to a tagged PDF document.

update-structure-element-language-french.title: Update Language of a Tagged PDF Structure Element to French
update-structure-element-language-french.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, access its tagged content, locate a ParagraphElement, set its language to French, and save the document. Optionally shows where to invoke PDF/UA validation.

set-document-language-in-tagged-pdf.title: Set Document Language in Tagged PDF
set-document-language-in-tagged-pdf.description: Shows how to add a language attribute to a PDF's structure tree using Aspose.Pdf's tagged content API for improved accessibility.

propagate-language-to-tagged-pdf.title: Propagate Language Attribute to Tagged PDF Elements
propagate-language-to-tagged-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to set a language attribute on the root structure element of a tagged PDF and automatically propagate it to all descendant elements using Aspose.Pdf.

add-tagged-table-to-pdf.title: Add Tagged Table to PDF Document
add-tagged-table-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to create a three‑row, four‑column table in a tagged PDF using Aspose.Pdf's logical structure API.

create-merged-table-header-tagged-pdf.title: Create Merged Table Header with TH Role and ActualText in Tagged PDF
create-merged-table-header-tagged-pdf.description: Loads an existing PDF, builds a tagged table with a header row where the first TH cell spans two columns, assigns the /TH role and sets /ActualText for each header, then saves the tagged PDF.

style-table-cells-background-border-padd.title: Style Table Cells with Background, Border, and Padding
style-table-cells-background-border-padd.description: Demonstrates how to apply background color, border thickness, and padding to each cell of a table in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

apply-custom-row-borders-to-pdf-table.title: Apply Custom Row Borders to PDF Table
apply-custom-row-borders-to-pdf-table.description: Demonstrates how to set different border styles for table rows and cells in a PDF based on the row index, using Aspose.Pdf's BorderInfo.

add-custom-cell-tags-and-validate-pdf.title: Add Custom Data Type Tags to PDF Table Cells and Validate PDF/A Compliance
add-custom-cell-tags-and-validate-pdf.description: The example loads an existing PDF, creates a tagged table with custom data‑type tags on each cell, saves the modified document, and validates it against PDF/A‑1B compliance.

create-nested-table-in-paragraph.title: Create Nested Table Inside Paragraph for Tagged PDF
create-nested-table-in-paragraph.description: Shows how to build a tagged PDF where a paragraph contains an outer table, and one of its cells hosts a nested inner table, using Aspose.Pdf's tagging API.

create-tagged-list-in-pdf.title: Create Tagged List in PDF
create-tagged-list-in-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to add a logical list structure with list items, labels, and body paragraphs to an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf's tagged‑content API.

create-form-field-tag-accessibility.title: Create Form Field and Tag it for Accessibility
create-form-field-tag-accessibility.description: Shows how to add a TextBox form field to a PDF, register it in the AcroForm, and associate it with a /Form structure element to make the document accessible.

add-tagged-form-field-with-placeholder.title: Add Tagged Form Field with Placeholder to PDF
add-tagged-form-field-with-placeholder.description: Loads an existing PDF, creates a TextBox form field with placeholder text, tags it with a /Form structure element for accessibility, and saves the updated document.

add-page-break-to-tagged-pdf.title: Add Page Break to Tagged PDF Logical Structure
add-page-break-to-tagged-pdf.description: Shows how to insert a page‑break element into the logical structure tree of a tagged PDF using Aspose.Pdf's tagged content API.

modify-paragraph-actualtext-in-tagged-pd.title: Modify Paragraph ActualText in Tagged PDF
modify-paragraph-actualtext-in-tagged-pd.description: Loads a tagged PDF, searches for a paragraph by its visible title, updates the paragraph's ActualText for accessibility correction, and saves the modified document.

replace-note-elements-in-tagged-pdf.title: Replace Existing Note Elements in a Tagged PDF
replace-note-elements-in-tagged-pdf.description: Shows how to remove all existing NoteElement objects from a PDF's structure tree and add a new note with updated text using Aspose.Pdf's tagged content API.

iterate-tagged-pdf-structure-elements.title: Iterate Tagged PDF Structure Elements
iterate-tagged-pdf-structure-elements.description: Loads a PDF, accesses its tagged content, and recursively walks the logical structure tree, logging each element's title, language and custom tag name.

set-paragraph-title-accessibility.title: Set Paragraph Title for PDF Accessibility
set-paragraph-title-accessibility.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's tagged‑content API to create a paragraph element, assign a concise Title property for accessibility, and save the updated PDF.

add-figure-title-to-tagged-pdf.title: Add Figure Title to Tagged PDF
add-figure-title-to-tagged-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's Tagged Content API to create a figure element, assign a concise title for accessibility, and insert it into the PDF's structure tree.

validate-pdf-ua-compliance-xml-report.title: Validate PDF/UA Compliance and Generate XML Report
validate-pdf-ua-compliance-xml-report.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, validate it against PDF/UA‑1 standards, write an XML compliance report, and read the compliance status via the IsPdfUaCompliant property.

check-pdf-ua-compliance-and-log-result.title: Check PDF/UA Compliance and Log Result
check-pdf-ua-compliance-and-log-result.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, evaluate its PDF/UA compliance via Document.IsPdfUaCompliant, and write the boolean outcome to the console and a log file.

parse-xml-validation-report-summary.title: Parse XML Validation Report and Summarize Error Codes
parse-xml-validation-report-summary.description: Shows how to load an XML validation report, extract error codes using LINQ to XML, count their frequencies, and output a human‑readable summary to the console and a text file.

find-images-missing-alt-text.title: Find Images Missing Alternative Text in PDF
find-images-missing-alt-text.description: Loads a PDF, iterates through each page and its image resources, checks for alternative text, and lists the identifiers of images that have no alt text.

extract-text-from-tagged-pdf.title: Extract Text from Tagged PDF via Structure Tree
extract-text-from-tagged-pdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, access its tagged content, traverse the logical structure tree, and collect the visible text from each structure element.

export-pdf-structure-tree-to-xml-xsl-rep.title: Export PDF Structure Tree to XML and Generate Report via XSLT
export-pdf-structure-tree-to-xml-xsl-rep.description: Shows how to export a PDF's logical structure tree to an XML file using Aspose.Pdf and then apply an XSLT stylesheet to create an HTML report.

export-pdf-structure-tree-to-json.title: Export PDF Structure Tree to JSON
export-pdf-structure-tree-to-json.description: Shows how to load a PDF, access its tagged (logical) structure, and serialize the structure tree into a JSON file for accessibility analysis.

export-tagged-pdf-content-to-json.title: Export Tagged PDF Content to JSON
export-tagged-pdf-content-to-json.description: Demonstrates how to read the logical structure of a tagged PDF using Aspose.Pdf, convert the hierarchy into a serializable object, and write it as an indented JSON file.

extract-note-elements-to-text.title: Extract Note Elements from Tagged PDF and Save to Text
extract-note-elements-to-text.description: Loads a PDF, accesses its tagged content, finds all NoteElement objects, concatenates their ActualText values, and writes the combined text to a UTF‑8 plain‑text file.

extract-pdf-links-to-csv.title: Extract PDF Link URLs to CSV
extract-pdf-links-to-csv.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterating through link annotations to retrieve their target URLs, and writing the collected URLs to a CSV file.

batch-tag-pdfs-in-folder.title: Batch Tag PDFs in a Folder
batch-tag-pdfs-in-folder.description: The example iterates through all PDF files in a directory, enables automatic tagging for missing structure elements, sets language and title, and saves each tagged PDF with a "_tagged" suffix.

batch-convert-untagged-pdfs-to-tagged.title: Batch Convert Untagged PDFs to Tagged PDFs with Auto‑Tagging
batch-convert-untagged-pdfs-to-tagged.description: Demonstrates how to process a folder of untagged PDF files, enable auto‑tagging, convert them to PDF/UA format, and save the tagged PDFs to a separate directory.

batch-validate-pdfs-xml-logs-summary-csv.title: Batch Validate PDFs and Generate XML Logs with Summary CSV
batch-validate-pdfs-xml-logs-summary-csv.description: The example loads each PDF in a folder, validates it against PDF/A‑1B using Aspose.Pdf, saves an XML validation log for each file, and creates a CSV summary of the validation results.

batch-pdf-validation-dashboard.title: Batch PDF Validation and Dashboard Generation
batch-pdf-validation-dashboard.description: Validates multiple PDFs for PDF/A‑1B compliance, writes XML logs for each file, and creates a summary dashboard PDF that shows compliance percentages per file.

add-missing-language-attributes-to-pdf-s.title: Add Missing Language Attributes to PDF Structure Elements
add-missing-language-attributes-to-pdf-s.description: Demonstrates how to set a default language for a PDF and recursively assign language attributes to all tagged structure elements that lack one, using Aspose.Pdf.
